seo.title: Atelier Luma — Brand & Digital Design Studio
seo.description: We craft distinctive brand identities and digital experiences for ambitious small businesses.

seo.title: Atelier Luma — Brand & Digital Design Studio
seo.description: We craft distinctive brand identities and digital experiences for ambitious small businesses.

props.heading: Design that feels unmistakably yours
props.subheading: Atelier Luma partners with founders and small teams to build brand systems and websites that turn first impressions into lasting trust.
props.imageAlt: Abstract brand design mood board with soft gradients

props.heading: What we do
props.subheading: Strategy, identity, and digital design — delivered as one cohesive studio partnership.

items.title: Brand identity
items.description: Logos, color systems, typography, and guidelines that keep your brand consistent everywhere.

items.title: Web design
items.description: Conversion-focused layouts built on a component library so your site stays flexible as you grow.

items.title: Launch support
items.description: From asset handoff to go-live, we stay close so your launch feels smooth — not stressful.

props.heading: Our process
props.subheading: A clear, collaborative path from first conversation to shipped brand.

items.title: Discover
items.description: We map your audience, competitors, and goals so every design decision ties back to business outcomes.
items.imageAlt: Team collaborating around a table with notebooks

items.title: Design
items.description: We explore visual directions quickly, refine the strongest concept, and build a system — not just a one-off page.
items.imageAlt: Designer working on color swatches and typography

items.title: Deliver
items.description: You receive production-ready files, component specs, and a site structure your team can evolve without us.
items.imageAlt: Laptop showing a polished website design mockup

props.heading: Trusted by growing brands
props.subheading: Founders and marketing leads who wanted design that finally matched their ambition.

testimonials.quote: Atelier Luma translated our messy ideas into a brand we are proud to put on every touchpoint.
testimonials.name: Maya Chen

testimonials.quote: The new site doubled our inbound leads in six weeks. The design feels premium without being pretentious.
testimonials.name: Daniel Ortiz

testimonials.quote: They think in systems, not screens. Our team can update pages confidently because everything is structured.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair

props.heading: Ready to build something distinctive?
props.subheading: Tell us about your project — we reply within two business days with next steps.

props.blurb: A boutique design studio helping small businesses look as polished as the work they do.
